parent.summary: postgres async ownership decision classified get_postgres_async as an infrastructure-owned singleton accessor / compatibility facade

authority.allowed_work: provider authorization evidence, steward tree updates, task card, and review report only

subject.authorization_decision: authorize a future path-limited G2.247 implementation to add an infrastructure-level provider/reset seam while preserving the existing singleton fallback and public re-export surface

rejected_authorization_options.reason: There are 21 active API route-body calls across multiple route files. Migrating those before creating an infrastructure seam would widen the first source lane and bypass background-task compatibility concerns.
Bulk migration would mix API route, monitoring infrastructure, historical compatibility, and tests in one lane.
The symbol remains the compatibility accessor and has 28 import lines, mostly through the public re-export surface.

authorized_future_lane.title: postgres async provider/reset seam implementation
required_behavior: add an explicit provider hook for get_postgres_async
add a reset hook that clears explicit provider state and restores default singleton behavior
preserve lazy MonitoringPostgreSQLAccess creation when no explicit provider is installed
add focused tests proving provider override, reset, fallback, and public re-export behavior
forbidden_behavior: changing route paths, response contracts, or OpenAPI schema
deleting get_postgres_async or the public re-export
editing get_monitoring_db or unrelated singleton seams
pre_implementation_gates: run GitNexus impact/context for get_postgres_async and the singleton module, using CLI fallback if MCP remains unavailable
run TDD red first for the provider/reset API before source implementation
limit staged files to the authorized paths
run focused pytest for the new provider test and any existing postgres async singleton/import smoke
run ruff on touched source/test files
run app/OpenAPI smoke to confirm route/path count is unchanged
run mainline scope gate with the future task card

not_authorized_from_g2_246: G2.247 implementation before this packet is accepted

freshness.openspec_validate: valid with PostHog telemetry network noise
